sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49124" key="qrhnw|diko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρηνῳδ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n49124.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">appropriate to a dirge</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἁρμονία</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1136e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
